text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Sakura Bakushin O and I attend the
Arima Kinen as spectators.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Convinced that the Arima Kinen is the race most
appropriate for a class representative such as
herself, Sakura Bakushin O buzzes with
excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starring in the Arima Kinen may as well be next to
impossible considering her capabilities... but I try
to think of how to utilize this motivation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believe her speed has higher potential and that
Sakura Bakushin O will try to live up to those
expectations.
